name: zindex_archive_destroy
description: zIndexArchive::Destroy closes/free-resets archive state and frees the auxiliary reserved buffer if records were never allocated.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Destroy@zIndexArchive@@QAEXXZ at 0x4a61b0 still fails: 8 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 7 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 26 bytes, VC object symbol size 32 bytes.
Reviewed difference is call/import spelling around CloseAndFreeRecords/free plus branch-label layout; normalized instruction behavior matches.
The native smokes exercise mounted archive destruction and the reservedFree-only early-return cleanup path.
